title: Smoky Dense Croatian Whole Wheat Stew
description: A hearty, low‑fat Croatian stew bursting with smoky flavor and dense whole‑wheat grains, perfect for a festive gathering.

ingredients.name: whole wheat bulgur
ingredients.notes: soaked in boiling water for 10 min then drained

ingredients.name: green peas, blanched
ingredients.notes: blanch for 2 min in boiling water, then cool

instructions: Heat 1 tsp olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and minced garlic, sauté until translucent (about 3–4 minutes).
Add diced red bell pepper and cook for 2 minutes.
Stir in smoked paprika, dried oregano, and bay leaf; cook for 30 seconds to release aromas.
Add canned diced tomatoes and stir to combine.
Pour in low‑fat vegetable broth and bring to a simmer.
Add the soaked whole wheat bulgur, reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes until the bulgur is tender and liquid is absorbed.
In a separate pot, blanch the peas: bring salted water to a boil, add peas for 2 minutes, drain, rinse with cold water, and set aside.
After the bulgur is cooked, stir in the blanched peas and simmer an additional 5 minutes to meld flavors.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve hot, optionally garnished with fresh parsley.
